entries.hypothesis: REFRAMED H1 (PRIMARY — Agent B pre-impl caveat 2026-05-11): peak_return captures DIFFERENT information than point_return at H60. Comparing test_ic against each arm's OWN labels is tautological. The PRIMARY gate is BACKTEST P&L (execution-aligned via OpraCalibratedCosts.deep_itm() point-to-point 0DTE Deep ITM). Sub-claims: H1a peak vs point arms produce DIFFERENT backtest P&L with BH FDR q < 0.10 over K=2 paired comparisons (peak-vs-point within each of {ridge, tlob}); H1b effect- size floor |ΔP&L| > 0.5%; H1c at least 1 arm median |pred| > 1.4 bps. Refuting H1 = closes a research direction (peak_return not tradeable enhancement vs point_return at H60). LABEL-EXECUTION MISMATCH CAVEAT: peak_return is forward-leaking structurally similar to smoothed-vs-point pathology (E8 root cause). R-16a relies on backtest P&L (execution-aligned) NOT test_ic (label- aligned) as the tradability test. H2 (BASELINE GATE): temporal_ridge captures ≥80% of TLOB IC within return_type per CLAUDE.md §Validated Findings. Required by hft-rules §13. H3 (COST GATE): backtest median |prediction| > 1.4 bps Deep ITM breakeven per OpraCalibratedCosts.deep_itm(). Backtesting stage auto-applies. POWER-LIMITED: 1 seed × 4 arms; if INDETERMINATE result, plan R-16a- extended (4 arms × 3 seeds per seed_stability.yaml template).

entries.hypothesis: H1 PRIMARY (tradeability at H60-hold — three-conjunctive): Ridge × Point × H60-hold backtest CI > 0 AND mean OptRet across 8 thresholds > 0 AND per-seed test_ic CI lower bound > 0.05. H6 LABEL-EXECUTION DIAGNOSTIC: smoothed × H60-hold mean OptRet ≤ 0% confirms E8 is structural (label-side) NOT hold-mismatch artifact. GO if H1 + H4 satisfied. REFUTE if any H1 fails (closes Ridge×Point×H60 direction; unblocks Option C Triple-Barrier or Option E feature ablation). INDETERMINATE triggers R-16e-extended (N=20 + walk-forward). ABORT if H4 fails (architectural ship-blocker).
